title: Persival extended native trace
description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) encoding the STRUCTURAL contract of schema/SCHEMA.md v1.0. Term semantics are defined in schema/GLOSSARY.md. Strict (additionalProperties:false) on objects Persival defines; permissive on the existing AgentSeer action/human_input objects that carry unenumerated LangChain fields. Referential-integrity constraints that JSON Schema cannot express cleanly are enforced by schema/validate.py, not here.

schema_version.description: SCHEMA.md 4.1 - the spec version this trace conforms to; additive within the 1.x line.

components.description: SCHEMA.md 3. Existing AgentSeer object extended with memory_stores; kept permissive because agents/tools carry unenumerated upstream fields.

memory_items.description: SCHEMA.md 4.4 - top-level, content-free item registry; items span sessions.

actions.description: SCHEMA.md 3/4.5 - array-of-arrays: the outer array is turns; each inner array is one human_input object followed by action objects.

actions_edge.description: SCHEMA.md 3/7 - existing, unchanged legacy structure (array-of-arrays of edges). Kept permissive.

agent.description: Owning agent name; REQUIRED iff scope = agent_scoped, FORBIDDEN when scope = shared (enforced by the conditional below).

allOf.description: SCHEMA.md 4.2 - agent is required for agent_scoped stores and forbidden otherwise.

turn.description: SCHEMA.md 3 - one turn: element 0 is a human_input object, elements 1..n are action objects.

human_input.description: SCHEMA.md 4.5 - existing AgentSeer human_input object. Additive: label (identity/linking key) and the new key session_id are schema-required; the upstream payload fields (time, input) are present-in-practice but not enforced. Type is by label prefix (human_input_*). Permissive: additionalProperties allowed.

label.description: Identity & linking key (SCHEMA.md 4.5); required; MUST carry the human_input_ prefix.

time.description: Existing; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

input.description: Existing; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

action.description: SCHEMA.md 4.5 - existing AgentSeer action object. Additive: label (identity/linking key) plus the two new keys session_id and memory_ops are schema-required; the upstream LangChain payload fields (input, output, agent_label, agent_name, model, span_id, components_in_input, components_in_output) are present-in-practice but NOT schema-enforced, so a thinner trace still validates. Type is by label prefix (action_*). Permissive: additionalProperties allowed.

label.description: Identity & linking key (SCHEMA.md 4.5); required; MUST carry the action_ prefix.

input.description: Existing LangChain message array; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

output.description: Existing LangChain LLMResult; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

agent_label.description: Existing; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

agent_name.description: Existing; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

model.description: Existing; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

span_id.description: Existing; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

components_in_input.description: Existing; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

components_in_output.description: Existing; present in practice, not schema-enforced.

action_edge.description: SCHEMA.md 7 - legacy action edge (source, target, optional memory_label). Kept permissive.

memory_op.description: SCHEMA.md 4.6 - a single typed memory access performed by an action. before_after presence is conditional on the op verb (SCHEMA.md 4.6/4.7).

allOf.description: SCHEMA.md 4.6/4.7 - before_after is REQUIRED for mutating ops (write|update|delete|transform) and MUST be ABSENT for read|noop.
SCHEMA.md 4.6 - item_ids must be non-empty for every op except noop; noop may be empty.

before_after.description: SCHEMA.md 4.7 - mutation diff; only the arrays relevant to the op are populated.

new_status.description: SCHEMA.md 4.7 - a delete/invalidate never sets 'active'; narrowing of the item-level status enum for this field only.

snapshot.description: SCHEMA.md 4.8 - optional session-boundary full store item-set, by reference.

enum_op_actor.description: SCHEMA.md 4.6 / GLOSSARY 5 - op actor is reasoning_agent or memory_controller ONLY; never external_input.
